meta.title: Archival & open-media research pointers per species
meta.disclaimer: URLs are search entry points and curated hints, not guaranteed specimen-level links. Verify with holding institution.

notable_archives_curated.label: MorphoSource — CT/mesh for comparative mammoth material

research_protocol: Confirm IUCN category and dates on species page before citing.
Prefer institution catalog numbers + DOIs (MorphoSource) over unlicensed uploads.
For film/audio, verify rights before web embed.
